The Estate

Rare Dual-Structure
Luxury Compound

Gated Beverlywood compound with detached guest residence and heated pool/spa in prime 90035. Rare dual-structure configuration offering approximately 4,492 sq ft of combined living space across a 5-bedroom main residence and a private self-contained guest house on a single gated lot. The main residence features open-concept living filled with natural light and a chef's kitchen equipped with dual sinks and dual ovens. Hardwood flooring upstairs and Italian porcelain flooring on the main level complement the clean modern design. The spacious primary suite includes a spa-style bath with steam sauna.

Positioned on a quiet tree-lined street in the coveted 90035 corridor — minutes from Century City, Beverly Hills, Fox Studios, and Cedars-Sinai. Offered unfurnished with furnishings available at an additional monthly fee.

Financial Summary

Lease Terms

9432 Oakmore Rd · Los Angeles CA 90035 MLS# 25594215
Monthly Rent $23,950
Security Deposit $26,850
Minimum Lease Term 6 Months
Preferred Lease 12+ Months
Furnished Unfurnished (optional add-on)
Pets Considered with conditions
Parking Gated driveway + EV charging station
Utilities Tenant responsible (not included)
Pool Maintenance Tenant responsible
Short-Term Stays Not permitted
Credit Report $49.99 — paid by tenant

Application: CAR application · Credit report · Proof of income · Submit as single PDF

Why 2026 Is Different

2026 Executive Demand Timeline

Los Angeles faces an unprecedented convergence of macro-events in 2026. Premium executive housing supply is critically limited. Secure now.

CRITICAL EXTREME HIGH SUSTAINED

Beverly Hills Hilton · 4.1 mi

Milken Institute Global Conference

CRITICAL

The world's most important gathering of capital allocators, sovereign wealth funds, and C-suite leaders. 4,000+ attendees. LA's highest corporate housing demand week of the year.

◈

APR

2026

◈
APR 2026

SoFi Stadium · Rose Bowl · 18 mi

FIFA World Cup — LA Operations Hub

EXTREME

Los Angeles hosts 10+ FIFA World Cup matches. Corporate hospitality units, FIFA logistics staff, broadcast executives, and sponsor VIPs require 30–90 day executive housing. Largest demand event in LA history.

◉

MAY

2026

◉
MAY 2026

LA Convention Center · 10.4 mi

Display Week 2026

HIGH

Society for Information Display annual flagship event. 12,000+ display technology engineers, executives, and investors. Prime corporate relocation window for tech sector.

◈

JUN

2026

◈
JUN 2026

LA Convention Center · 10.4 mi

AWS Summit Los Angeles 2026

HIGH

Amazon Web Services flagship summit drawing 20,000+ cloud architects, CTOs, and enterprise buyers. Tech sector executives relocating to LA frequently source long-term rentals during this window.

◈

JUN

2026

◈
JUN 2026

Rose Bowl, Pasadena · 25 mi

FIFA World Cup Finals

EXTREME

World Cup Final match. Global broadcast, FIFA executives, heads of state, and corporate sponsors require premium private residences for 30–90 day extended stays. Supply is projected critically short.

◉

JUL

2026

◉
JUL 2026

LA Metro · Ongoing

Post-Event Corporate Relocation Wave

SUSTAINED

Following the World Cup, multiple media, tech, and entertainment companies have announced LA expansion plans. Q3 2026 represents a sustained corporate housing demand surge driven by permanent relocations.
